archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Swiss Minimalist grey base

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col relative bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden

motion_and_interactions.swipe_gestures: Implement via framer-motion <motion.li>. drag='x', dragConstraints={{ left: 0, right: 0 }}, dragElastic={0.8}. Threshold for action ~80px. Right swipe (positive x) triggers complete. Left swipe (negative x) triggers delete.
motion_and_interactions.swipe_feedback_layer: Absolute positioned background behind the task item. Background color transitions: Neutral -> Green (Right Swipe) / Red (Left Swipe). Icons scale up as swipe progresses.
motion_and_interactions.list_animation: Use <AnimatePresence> and layout prop on motion elements so checked tasks glide to the bottom section smoothly.
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Active states on buttons scale down slightly (active:scale-95 transition-transform).

components.Task_Item: Cardless design. 1px border-b border-slate-100. Swipeable area sits on top of action background.
components.Quick_Add_Input: Sticky at bottom. Crystal glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-t border-slate-200 shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]. Generous padding.
components.Priority_Tags: Small pill badges using light blue/grey accents (text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-sky-50 text-sky-600).
components.Due_Date: Inline small text using lucide Calendar icon, formatted compactly (e.g., 'Today', 'Oct 12') text-slate-400.
components.Checklists_Nav: Horizontal scrollable pill tabs at the top for switching multiple checklists. Active: bg-slate-800 text-white. Inactive: text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-200.
components.Completed_Section: A visually distinct bottom section. Tasks moved here receive a grey shading (bg-slate-50/50), text turns muted grey, and strikethrough is applied.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the greyish-toned minimalist visual language. Do not introduce heavy shadows or harsh borders.
Implement the task list state entirely via browser localStorage. No backend APIs.

Use framer-motion to create the swipe-to-action interactions. The interaction should feel tactile and frictionless. When the user swipes an item left, show a red background with a trash icon underneath; swiping right shows a green background with a checkmark.
Once checked, use framer-motion 'layout' animation to move the task smoothly to a 'Completed' section below the active tasks.

Use Shadcn UI components for Edit Task (Dialog/Sheet), Due Date (Popover + Calendar), and Priority (Select/Dropdown). Overwrite Shadcn styles to strip away their default 'Vercel' look, replacing them with the soft pastel/grey theme.
Ensure the layout is robust on mobile devices: prevent horizontal scrolling on the main container and handle the viewport height with h-[100dvh].
Include the required data-testid attributes on all interactive elements: checklist tabs, task items, swipe-complete zones, swipe-delete zones, and the quick add button.
